rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use boolean helper declarations to express range conditions in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Formulate guarantees using visible identifiers and explicit bounds when available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for boolean helper declarations in AGREE contracts.
Structure AGREE annex blocks with proper scoping for component types and implementations.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
